items.headline: Anthropic's new Claude Sonnet 5 is faster, cheaper, and now the default
items.summary: Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 5, its most capable mid-tier model yet — the company says it performs close to its top-end Opus model while costing a lot less. It's now the default model for Free and Pro users on Claude.ai, with introductory pricing of $2 per million tokens in and $10 per million out (a token is the small chunk of text AI is billed by) through August 31.
items.why_it_matters: If you use Claude for writing, brainstorming, or research, you're likely already on the better, faster model at no extra cost — and if you or your developer builds anything on Claude, the temporary lower pricing makes it cheaper to run through the summer.

items.headline: Anthropic launches Claude Science, a research workbench for scientists
items.summary: Anthropic introduced Claude Science, a specialized workspace that connects Claude to more than 60 scientific databases and prebuilt tools for fields like genomics and protein research, aimed at helping researchers run and fact-check computational experiments in one place.
items.why_it_matters: This one is built for lab researchers rather than small business owners, but it's a clear signal Anthropic is tailoring Claude for specific professions — a hint that more industry-specific 'Claude for ___' tools are on the way.

categories.title: Tools & Tips for Creators and Small Biz
